title: Set up Managed Payments
description: Set up Checkout for managed payments with subscription and one-time product options, then listen for completed checkout events.

nodes.title: Create subscription product
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create one-time product
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Create managed Checkout Session
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.

nodes.title: Complete a test payment
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Listen for checkout.session.completed
nodes.review_prompt: Run stripe trigger checkout.session.completed and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
